narrative:
Windham Ex Vill Sd (Portage) exempted village school district has 2,233 registered voters, with 58.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.5%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.7 percentage points.
